services.name: org.webosbrew.dtsenabler.service
services.description: Detect the LG TV generation and apply the correct DTS-restore mechanism. All privileged work is proxied through the Homebrew Channel exec service.

commands.name: detect
commands.description: Run the read-only detection probe; return the target profile + raw probes

commands.name: status
commands.description: Detect + report model/webOS/GStreamer and whether the matched patch is active

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Apply the DTS-restore mechanism matching the detected profile

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Remove the boot hook + best-effort unmount for the detected profile

commands.name: uninstall
commands.description: Disable + remove all on-device state for the detected profile

commands.name: test
commands.description: Decode each bundled DTS sample (mp4/ts/m2ts) through the media registry; report PASS/FAIL per container

commands.name: testfiles
commands.description: Return on-device paths of the bundled DTS samples for in-app play-by-ear
